Brand Identity · Refinement Round 4

The Lotus, in Full Bloom

Everything from Round 3 stays — the wordmark, the bold teal crest — with one change: the lotus is now solid coral. Two treatments to compare: cascading shades of coral, and pure coral with white line detail.

What you asked → What we did

"Everything in version 3"✓Identical wordmarks and bold teal crest ring — only the lotus changed
"A solid coral lotus"✓The Logo #1 lotus rebuilt as solid vector petals — no more open line art
"Cascading shades of coral… or a white outline. Or both."✓Both, side by side: Options A/B/E cascade from deep coral at the center to soft blush at the outer leaves; Options C/D/F are pure coral with fine white petal lines
